title: goodenia marginata
intro: Goodenia marginata, also known as the Blue Goodenia or Native Violet, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a small, shrubby perennial that belongs to the Goodeniaceae family and is known for its vibrant blue flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. The leaves and flowers of Goodenia marginata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to promote overall health and well-being.
